_comment: Recipe type registry. Authoritative source for recipe type/category id → name mapping shared between TS client and Rust server. Types identify the trigger mechanism; categories identify the branch direction or match mode within a type. IDs are stable — never reassign a numeric id once used; tombstone removed entries with a _reserved_ prefix.

stack._comment: Player-built stacks. Matched when a client submits a stack via submit_inventory_stacks.

on_create._comment: Triggered automatically when a card is inserted via insert_card_row.

magnetic._comment: Magnetic-phase inner recipes. Matched by the slot-fill ticker on a magnetic action's anchor; success/failure branches resolve when the loop queues an inner or runs out of budget.

up._comment: Top branch — for stack recipes, slots extend upward from the root; for magnetic inner recipes, pulled cards stack upward on the anchor.

down._comment: Bottom branch — for stack recipes, slots extend downward from the root; for magnetic inner recipes, pulled cards stack downward on the anchor.

self._comment: The newly created card is both root and actor.

_reserved_3._comment: Formerly 'magnetic' under on_create — installed a server-side magnetic-phase ticker. Replaced by definition-flag inheritance in cards::create_at + client-driven MagneticResolutionManager. Tombstoned per the stable-id policy.

_reserved_4._comment: Formerly 'success' — when magnetic inner recipes were filed under magnetic/{success,failure}. Success vs. failure is now derived from which slot of the outer recipe points at the inner; inners are filed under magnetic/{up,down} by stacking direction. Tombstoned per the stable-id policy.
